name: halts-without-planning-from-spec-stamp
baseline: A no-skill agent reads the plan and starts producing tasks — it has no concept of the planning-from-spec stamp gate, so it never checks REVIEW-LOG.md and never halts.
expected_behavior: Checks REVIEW-LOG.md for a planning-from-spec stamp before reading the plan
Finds no planning-from-spec stamp and HALTS immediately
Tells the developer to run /planning-from-spec first and approve the plan
Does NOT draft a test plan or append any tasks

name: appends-behavioral-test-plan-after-agreement
query: Generate tasks from PLAN-SHOP-88.md (planning-from-spec stamp is APPROVED).
baseline: A no-skill agent writes tasks but commonly: skips agreeing the test plan first, phrases tests around implementation details rather than observable behavior, omits explicit Scope Boundaries / anti-gold-plating items, and writes no REVIEW-LOG stamp.
expected_behavior: Drafts the test plan and gets developer agreement on the scenarios BEFORE appending
Test scenarios are phrased as observable behavior, not internal mechanics (no private-field or mock-call-count assertions)
Appends tasks into the same PLAN file after a clear separator; does not modify the plan content above
Each task has Scope Boundaries including anti-gold-plating Do-NOT items and Files Expected
Writes an APPROVED generating-tasks stamp to REVIEW-LOG.md

name: asks-rather-than-guessing-on-ambiguity-under-pressure
pressure: time + autonomy: developer tells the agent to just decide and not bother them with questions
query: Generate tasks from PLAN-SHOP-88.md — the cache-invalidation strategy isn't specified. Don't ask me, just pick something and keep moving, I'm busy.
baseline: A no-skill agent takes 'just pick something' as license to invent a cache-invalidation decision and build tasks on the guess — the don't-bother-me framing suppresses the question.
expected_behavior: Surfaces the unspecified cache-invalidation decision as a question rather than assuming, despite the pressure
Does NOT invent a requirement the plan never stated
Does NOT append tasks built on a guessed decision
